nasb.text: So You made known to them Your holy sabbath, And laid down for them commandments, statutes and law, Through Your servant Moses.

esv.text: and you made known to them your holy Sabbath and commanded them commandments and statutes and a law by Moses your servant.

cnv.text: 你使他們認識你的聖安息， 藉你僕人摩西向他們頒布誡命、條例和律法。

ccb.text: 你使他们知道你的神圣安息日，借你仆人摩西赐给他们诫命、律例和法度。
